description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden cabinet with two front doors and three drawers at the bottom, each fitted with round handles. The top surface is cluttered with various items, including a stack of books, a round clock, a pink piggy bank, and a purple table lamp with a black base. The cabinet's sides are plain, with one side featuring a couple of small notes or papers attached. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, and the overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in a home, office, or urban setting. The cabinet stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The visible contents and accessories on top add a lived-in, personal touch to the object.
description: A tall, narrow wooden cabinet with two doors, three drawers, and various personal items like books, a lamp, and a piggy bank on top. The cabinet has a warm brown finish and round handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors, three drawers with round handles, and all items on top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the piggy bank, lamp, and books on top, as well as two small notes or papers attached to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wooden back with the lamp and books visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the books, lamp, and piggy bank on top, with no additional features on the side.
